name: Tamanu Oil
description: A therapeutic Polynesian oil legendary for healing scars, wounds, and blemishes through regenerative lipids.
scientificSummary: Contains calophyllolide and inophyllum, anti-inflammatory coumarins unique to this plant, which promote wound closure.
mechanismOfAction: Coumarins inhibit prostaglandin synthesis while fatty acids support fibroblast activity and new collagen deposition.

seo.title: Tamanu Oil - Healing Polynesian Botanical | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Tamanu Oil heals scars and blemishes through its unique regenerative compounds.
